_schema.description: Hand-verified code-navigation tasks for the ministr-vs-LSP benchmark. Answers are byte-anchored to specific commits; re-verify line ranges if the source moves. Paths are repo-relative, POSIX separators.

task.from: definition/references: a real source position to query FROM { file, line } (1-based). Omitted for bridge.
task.expect: array of expected locations [{ file, line_start, line_end }]; for references this is the full set used for precision/recall
task.lsp_can_answer: true if a Rust-only LSP (rust-analyzer) can in principle resolve this; false for cross-language bridges it is structurally blind to — the coverage differentiator

_schema.verified_against_commit: d7ecd94 (v0.5.0 + #130); RE-VERIFY line ranges before trusting metrics

tasks.note: rust-analyzer is Rust-only and cannot connect the #[tauri::command] to its TS invoke("linked_projects_list") call site. ministr_bridge is expected to. The TS line is a placeholder until the harness records the real invoke site.
Cross-language Tauri boundary; LSP-blind by construction.
